words.reading: コンビニエンスストア
exampleSentences: I bought a rice ball at the convenience store.
The convenience store on the corner is open all night.
We saw dinosaur bones at the museum.
My class visited the science museum last Friday.
Excuse me, can you tell me the way to the station?
She said excuse me and walked past the crowd.
Mom said welcome back when I came home from school.
Welcome back! How was your trip?
See you tomorrow at school!
She waved and said see you after class.
Grandma said take care when we left her house.
Take care on your bike — the road is wet.
Good luck on your spelling test today!
My friend said good luck before my piano recital.

words.reading: コングラチュレーションズ
exampleSentences: Congratulations on winning first place!
Everyone shouted congratulations when she passed her exam.
We raised our juice glasses and said cheers.
Cheers! Thank you for dinner tonight.
The teacher knocked, and the principal said come in.
Come in and warm up by the heater.
He held the door open and said after you.
After you — I will wait here for the elevator.
The shopkeeper smiled and said have a nice day.
Nice day for a walk in the park!
I see, so the shop closes at six.
She explained the rule, and I said I see.
Of course you can borrow my pencil.
Can you help me? Of course, no problem.
He said no problem when I asked for help.
No problem — I can carry that bag for you.
I love pizza! Me too!
She wants to go swimming, and me too.
Will it rain today? I think so.
Is the library open? I think so — let's check.

Can you count all the apples in the basket?
Let's count to twenty before we start the game.
Add three and five to get eight.

Ten minus four equals six.
What is twenty minus seven?

February is the coldest month of the year.

April showers make the garden very muddy.

We carry umbrellas to school all through June.

The leaves begin to change color in September.

The weather gets cooler every October.

We wear coats to school in November.
We decorate a tree at home in December.

We play tag on the playground at recess.

I forgot my lunch box on the school bus.
Today's school lunch is soup and bread rolls.
I look forward to school lunch every day.

words.reading: フィジカルエデュケーション
